tool_args.label: Safety and Security Transformation - organizational restructuring
tool_args.raw_text: The committee will receive updated safety metrics and a briefing on Transformation.

payload.claim_text: The Safety Committee received a briefing on Safety and Security Transformation, which included organizational charts for the new Safety, Health, & Environment and Security organizational structure under the Chief of Safety and Security.
payload.description: The April 2021 Safety Committee meeting included a briefing on Transformation of the Safety and Security Office organizational structure.
payload.subject: Safety and Security Transformation

tool_args.label: Virtual Board meeting due to COVID-19
tool_args.raw_text: Because of the ongoing COVID-19 public health crisis, the MTA Chairman convened a one-day, virtual Board and Committee meeting session on January 21, 2021

payload.claim_text: Because of the ongoing COVID-19 public health crisis, the MTA Chairman convened a one-day, virtual Board and Committee meeting session on January 21, 2021, which included the Safety Committee.
payload.subject: COVID-19 impact on meetings

tool_args.label: COVID-19 rear door boarding and fare suspension
tool_args.raw_text: Due to the implementation of rear door boarding and suspension of fare collection to protect frontline employees from the spread of COVID-19, AFC (MetroCard and OMNY) was not used from March 23, 2020, to August 30, 2020, to determine ridership. During this time, ridership was estimated using Automated Passenger Counter (APC) data.

payload.claim_text: AFC (MetroCard and OMNY) was not used from March 23, 2020, to August 30, 2020, to determine ridership due to rear door boarding and fare suspension during COVID-19. Ridership was estimated using Automated Passenger Counter (APC) data.
payload.subject: COVID-19 ridership estimation
